name: CLX - MGA Insurance E&O Verification v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. advisor or mga_principal session. Records E&O insurance for advisor. Validates coverage_amount >= 200000000 cents ($2M minimum). Encrypts policy_number, stores last4. Updates advisor_onboarding.eo_insurance_verified.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ vertical_id: 'insurance', advisor_id: $json.advisor_id, carrier_name: $json.carrier_name, policy_number_encrypted: $json.policy_number_encrypted, policy_number_last4: $json.policy_number_last4, coverage_amount: $json.coverage_amount, effective_date: $json.effective_date, expires_date: $json.expires_date, documentation_url: $json.documentation_url, verified_at: new Date().toISOString(), status: 'active' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ vertical_id: 'insurance', event_type: 'eo_insurance_verified', advisor_id: $('Encrypt Policy').item.json.advisor_id, performed_by_user_id: $('Encrypt Policy').item.json.verifier_id, performed_by_role: 'advisor', event_data: { carrier_name: $('Encrypt Policy').item.json.carrier_name, coverage_amount_cents: $('Encrypt Policy').item.json.coverage_amount, expires_date: $('Encrypt Policy').item.json.expires_date }, occurred_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ (() => { const ins = $('Insert E&O').item.json; const row = Array.isArray(ins) ? ins[0] : ins; return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, vertical_id: 'insurance', eo_id: row && row.id, policy_number_last4: row && row.policy_number_last4 }); })() }}
